review.description: Please provide an evaluation of the quality, clarity, soundness, originality, significance and pertinence of this work to IWAI, including a list of its pros and cons (max 200000 characters). Add formatting using Markdown and formulas using LaTeX. For more information see https://openreview.net/faq

enum.description: 5: Excellent, technically flawless, with rigorous methodology, sound theoretical foundations, and thorough validation
4: Good, technically solid with minor issues that do not affect the main conclusions
3: Fair, technically acceptable but with some methodological weaknesses or gaps in validation
2: Poor, significant technical flaws or insufficient rigor that weaken the conclusions
1: Very poor, major technical errors or fundamentally flawed methodology

soundness.description: Technical quality and rigor of the work.

enum.description: 5: Excellent, highly novel, introducing groundbreaking ideas, methods, or perspectives
4: Good, clearly novel contribution that meaningfully extends prior work
3: Fair, moderately original, with some new ideas combined with existing approaches
2: Poor, limited novelty, mostly incremental over existing work
1: Very poor, not original, largely duplicates or trivially modifies prior work
5: Excellent, high impact, likely to substantially influence the field or open new research directions
4: Good, clear impact, results are important and useful to a broad audience
3: Fair, moderate impact, results are useful but limited in scope or audience
2: Poor, limited impact, results are unlikely to influence subsequent work
1: Very poor, no discernible impact or relevance to the field
5: Excellent, perfectly aligned with the conference scope and topics of interest
4: Good, clearly relevant to the conference and of interest to its audience
3: Fair, reasonably relevant, though somewhat tangential to the core topics
2: Poor, marginally relevant, would fit better at a different venue
1: Very poor, not relevant to the conference scope
5: Excellent, really clear, well-structured, and easy to follow throughout
4: Good, well-written and clearly organized, with only minor issues
3: Fair, adequately written but with notable issues in clarity, structure, or polish
2: Poor, difficult to follow due to unclear writing or poor organization
1: Very poor, severely unclear or disorganized, hindering understanding

presentation.description: Clarity of writing and overall presentation.

enum.description: 10: Top 5% of accepted papers, seminal paper
9: Top 15% of accepted papers, strong accept
8: Top 50% of accepted papers, clear accept
7: Good paper, accept
6: Marginally above acceptance threshold
5: Marginally below acceptance threshold
4: Ok but not good enough, rejection
3: Clear rejection
2: Strong rejection
1: Trivial or wrong
5: The reviewer is absolutely certain that the evaluation is correct and very familiar with the relevant literature
4: The reviewer is confident but not absolutely certain that the evaluation is correct
3: The reviewer is fairly confident that the evaluation is correct
2: The reviewer is willing to defend the evaluation, but it is quite likely that the reviewer did not understand central parts of the paper
1: The reviewer's evaluation is an educated guess

confidence.description: How confident are you in your assessment?
